title: The Instant Loan App
scenario: Short on cash before payday, you see an ad for an app promising '₹15,000 in 5 minutes, no paperwork'. The fine print mentions a ₹3,000 'processing fee', daily late charges, and demands access to your contacts and photos. The effective interest works out to over 100% a year.

choices.label: Refuse, uninstall the app, and instead ask for a small salary advance or trim spending
choices.lesson: Predatory loan apps hide brutal rates and misuse your data to harass you; legitimate lenders disclose costs clearly and never demand your contacts.

choices.label: Take the quick ₹15,000 to tide over the gap
choices.lesson: After fees you receive less than promised and owe far more, with aggressive recovery tactics that can spiral into a debt trap.
